headline: Can Coca-Cola Retain Pricing Power and Regain Momentum
summary: Investors are watching Coca-Cola (NYSE: KO) ahead of Q1 2026 results due before the market opens Tuesday, April 28. After Keurig Dr Pepper (NASDAQ:KDP) posted stronger-than-expected results pointing to durable beverage pricing and resilient demand, this print will test whether KO’s momentum is still intact. Pricing Held the Line, Volume Is the Question Last quarter, ... Can Coca-Cola Retain Pricing Power and Regain Momentum

headline: Coca-Cola Names New People Chief As Talent Shapes Growth Story
summary: Coca-Cola (NYSE:KO) has appointed Tapaswee Chandele as Global Chief People Officer, effective May 1, 2026. Chandele has held senior human resources roles across multiple regions within the company. Outgoing CPO Lisa Chang will remain as a senior advisor and continue to serve on the board of The Coca-Cola Foundation. Coca-Cola, the global beverage company behind its flagship soft drink and a broad portfolio of brands, is making this leadership change at a time when talent, culture, and...
